title: "transformClass" method should be used instead of "build" when transforming a class
description: When transforming a class, the "transformClass" method should be preferred over the generic "build" method to ensure clarity and maintainability. Using the appropriate method improves code readability and reduces the risk of errors.
recommendation: Refactor code to use "transformClass" instead of "build" when performing class transformations.
impact: Improves code clarity and maintainability by using the correct transformation method.

checks.message: Refactor code to use "transformClass" instead of "build" when performing class transformations.
